hooks.command: node -e "const j=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));if(!j.agent_id){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'BOSS PROTOCOL: You are the orchestrator. Delegate file modifications to specialist subagents (model=sonnet for implementation, model=haiku for trivial fixes). Direct edits are acceptable ONLY for 1-line trivial changes or plan/draft markdown files.'}}))}"

node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Subagent finished. (1) Read changed files yourself, (2) Run tests/diagnostics to verify, (3) Only then mark task complete. Agent execution auto-logged to .knowledge/agents/agent-log.jsonl.'}}))"
node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'Teammate idle. Check TaskList — if all tasks done, send shutdown_request. If tasks remain, send next instructions.'}})"
node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'Task completed. Verify deliverable exists and check quality before accepting.'}})"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.knowledge';if(!fs.existsSync(p+'/INDEX.md')){process.exit(0)}const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const sDir=p+'/sessions';const hasLog=fs.existsSync(sDir)&&fs.readdirSync(sDir).some(f=>f.startsWith(today));const agentLog=p+'/agents/agent-log.jsonl';const hasWork=fs.existsSync(agentLog)&&fs.readFileSync(agentLog,'utf8').split('\n').filter(l=>l.trim()).some(l=>{try{return JSON.parse(l).ts&&JSON.parse(l).ts.startsWith(today)}catch{return false}});if(hasWork&&!hasLog){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Meaningful work detected (agent executions today) but no session log in .knowledge/sessions/'+today+'-*.md. Write a session summary before ending.'}));process.exit(0)}console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'allow'}))"

node -e "if(require('fs').existsSync('.knowledge/INDEX.md')){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'[KnowledgeVault] MANDATORY: Write session summary to .knowledge/sessions/YYYY-MM-DD-topic.md. Update INDEX.md if new decisions or learnings were added. This is enforced — session will be blocked without it.'}}))}"

hooks.prompt: Review the assistant's last response ONLY. Return {"ok":false,"reason":"..."} ONLY if: (1) the assistant launched agents THIS TURN and never checked results, or (2) the user asked for a commit and the assistant made changes but didn't commit. Do NOT flag incomplete just because a plan file exists. Return {"ok":true} if the assistant answered a question, confirmed work done, or completed all requested changes.
